# [pixi](../pixi.md) script

Manage standalone scripts with inline dependency metadata

--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/script_extender:description"

## Usage
```
pixi script <COMMAND>
```

## Subcommands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`init`](script/init.md) | Add a PEP 723 metadata block to a new or existing script |
| [`run`](script/run.md) | Run a script in its isolated environment |
